items.title_en: As prediction markets boom, questions arise over who will be the watchdog
items.title_zh: 随着预测市场的繁荣，出现了谁将成为监管者的问题
items.desc_en: As new contract types are introduced, prediction markets may have to work under two regulatory bodies.
items.desc_zh: 随着新合约类型的推出，预测市场可能必须在两个监管机构的监管下运作。

items.title_en: Trump is set to deliver an election-focused national address tonight. Here's what to know
items.title_zh: 特朗普将于今晚发表以选举为重点的全国讲话。这是你需要知道的
items.desc_en: "Without free and fair elections, you don't have a country," Trump said this week when asked to preview the speech.
items.desc_zh: “没有自由和公平的选举，就没有一个国家，”特朗普本周在被要求预演演讲时说道。

items.desc_zh: 公司现在需要以电子方式验证个人身份，以遏制盗窃和伪造行为。

items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。
